# Elizabeth Ann Stein

> Full-stack developer and designer building SaaS products and open-source tools.

## About
elizabethannstein.com is the personal portfolio and blog of Elizabeth Ann Stein, a full-stack developer specializing in Next.js, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. The site showcases projects, writing, and professional work.

## Key Features
- Project portfolio and case studies
- Technical blog and articles
- Open-source contributions
- Contact and hiring information

## Documentation
- [Homepage](https://elizabethannstein.com)
- [Projects](https://elizabethannstein.com/projects)
- [Blog](https://elizabethannstein.com/blog)

## Contact
- hello@elizabethannstein.com
